titleEn: duBreton unveils 'Verified No Cloning or Gene Editing' packaging
titleZh: duBreton推出‘无克隆或基因编辑验证’包装
summaryZh: duBreton在部分猪肉产品上标注‘无克隆或基因编辑验证’，向消费者提供当前无需强制披露的生产实践信息。此举反映了食品行业对透明度和消费者知情权的重视，值得关注其对市场标准和消费者选择的影响。
contentHtml: Claim appears on select duBreton pork products and provides consumers with information about production practices not currently required to be disclosed.
